tr.td: Prevent OOM by checking free VRAM.
cudaFree or munmap triggered on zero-ref.

ol.li: Validation Fail: Return 400 Bad Request. Transition aborted. System remains on OldVersion.
Swap Contention: Retry logic with jittered exponential backoff (Max 3 attempts).
